mapper.sql: id, server_task_id, task_type, task_params_json, status, error_summary, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE processing_task SET status = #{status}, error_summary = #{errorSummary}, update_time = NOW() WHERE server_task_id = #{serverTaskId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM processing_task WHERE server_task_id = #{serverTaskId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM processing_task WHERE task_type = #{taskType} AND status IN ('created', 'dispatched', 'running')

SELECT FROM processing_task WHERE task_type IN ('fund_catalog_refresh', 'fund_purchase_status_refresh', 'fund_period_return_refresh', 'fund_top_holding_refresh') AND status IN ('created', 'dispatched', 'running') AND update_time < #{cutoff} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM processing_callback callback_record WHERE callback_record.server_task_id = processing_task.server_task_id ) ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE processing_task SET status = 'callback_failed', error_summary = #{errorSummary}, update_time = NOW() WHERE server_task_id = #{serverTaskId} AND task_type IN ('fund_catalog_refresh', 'fund_purchase_status_refresh', 'fund_period_return_refresh', 'fund_top_holding_refresh') AND status IN ('created', 'dispatched', 'running') AND update_time < #{cutoff} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM processing_callback callback_record WHERE callback_record.server_task_id = processing_task.server_task_id )
